revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:千葉神社, en:Chiba Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Meeepmep]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chiba_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chiba_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{talk page header}}

<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers -->
<!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->

== Local discussion ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->

== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/93572461 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Source: ja:Talk:千葉神社 | revid=93572461 -->
== 由緒書きの丸写し ==

この記事の一部ないし全部は、千葉神社ないしその関係者が配付している由緒書きの丸写しですね。「御社殿」「御祭神」という敬称・敬語はWikipediaでは禁止されていることも知らず、きちんと訂正しないで書いているからバレバレです。記事本文を読むときはそのつもりで読んだ方がいいですよ。--[[特別:投稿記録/2400:4050:A443:A100:2950:25D0:27A0:B257|2400:4050:A443:A100:2950:25D0:27A0:B257]] 2023年1月26日 (木) 12:16 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1237982650 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:55, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{Broken anchors|links=
* <nowiki>[[Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines#Prefectural shrines|prefectural shrine]]</nowiki>  The anchor (#Prefectural shrines) is no longer available because it was [[Special:Diff/1149194760|deleted by a user]] before. <!-- {"title":"Prefectural shrines","appear":{"revid":918612984,"parentid":899786855,"timestamp":"2019-09-29T15:03:49Z","removed_section_titles":[],"added_section_titles":["CITEREF1975","Kan-sha","\"Min-sha\"","Metropolitan shrines","Clan or Domain shrines","Prefectural shrines","District shrine","Village shrines","Hokora or Ungraded shrines","Statistics"]},"disappear":{"revid":1149194760,"parentid":1149018913,"timestamp":"2023-04-10T18:31:31Z","removed_section_titles":["Metropolitan shrines","Prefectural shrines"],"added_section_titles":["Metropolitan and Prefectural Shrines"]}} -->
}}
